childhood.familyBackground: Educated family with professional background. Father was in business. Encouraged pursuit of education and entrepreneurship.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 전문 배경의 교육받은 가족. 아버지는 비즈니스에 종사. 교육 및 기업가정신 추구를 장려.
childhood.education: University of Bangalore, Biology; Fermentation Technology, National Institute of Engineering
childhood.educationKo: 벵갈루루 대학교, 생물학; 국립 공학 연구소, 발효 기술
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in Bangalore. Pursued education in science and fermentation technology, pioneering interest in biotechnology sector.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 벵갈루루에서 성장. 과학 및 발효 기술 교육 추구, 생명공학 부문의 선구적 관심.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Biocon, pioneering Indian biotech company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 인도 생명공학 회사를 개척한 Biocon 설립

careerTimeline.event: Built integrated biotechnology and pharmaceutical company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 통합 생명공학 및 제약 회사 구축

quotes.text: Science is the most honest form of truth
quotes.context: Interview about biotech innovation and responsibility
quotes.contextKo: 생명공학 혁신 및 책임에 대한 인터뷰

personalTraits.knownFor: Pioneering female entrepreneur and biotechnology innovator. Founded Biocon, one of India's most successful biotech companies. Known for scientific rigor and gender equality advocacy.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 선구적 여성 기업가이자 생명공학 혁신자. 인도 최고의 생명공학 회사 중 하나인 Biocon 설립. 과학적 엄밀성 및 성 평등 옹호로 알려짐.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports healthcare access, women's empowerment, and scientific research
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 의료 접근, 여성 권한 부여 및 과학 연구 지원
